params.desc: Animation to play when charge maximum

params.desc: Max value added to spawn scale

params.name: Direction
params.desc: The direction required for this offset

params.name: Spawn Platform
params.desc: Creates a platform at impact point.

params.name: Spawn Effect
params.desc: Creates an effect at impact point.

params.name: No Rotation
params.desc: Do not rotate the projectile according to angle

params.desc: Starts troop encounter with follow up settings

params.desc: Apply these states to troop enemies/player

params.name: Skill Linked
params.desc: Skill data linked to the projectile

params.name: Spawn Delay
params.desc: Delay spawn action by the set frame count

params.desc: Select the priority type for the projectile

params.name: Spawn Offsets
params.desc: Set specific spawn offset for character direction

params.name: Target Actor Indication

params.desc: Graphic used for targetted area for actor

params.desc: Graphic used for targetted area for enemy

params.name: Apply States
params.desc: States to apply to valid battler enemy

params.name: Knockback Range
params.desc: Custom knockback range for projectile. (-1 for default)

params.name: Knockback From User
params.desc: Apply knockback from user instead of projectile

params.name: Suction To User
params.desc: Apply suction to user instead of projectile

params.name: Duration
params.desc: How long projectile remains on screen.

params.name: Impact Duration
params.desc: How long projectile remains on screen after impact.

params.name: Contact Life
params.desc: Number of hits prior to destruction

params.name: Ignore Target
params.desc: Projectile will not stop at target destination

params.name: Contact Type
params.desc: If the projectile will hit enemies in path or on area only

params.name: Parabolic Movement
params.desc: The projectile will appear to move in an arc

params.name: Homing Projectile
params.desc: Saves the target and moves towards them.

params.name: Homing Duration
params.desc: Duration of which projectile follows target

params.name: Homing Angle
params.desc: Maximum divergence per frame in radians.

params.name: Deflect Collide
params.desc: On collision projectile will move in opposite direction

params.name: Explode Collide
params.desc: On collision projectile will create splash projectile

params.name: Hit Tags
params.desc: Events or targets with this hit tag will be hit

params.name: Type
params.desc: Linear, Angular, Scalar, Centric or Default

params.name: Wait
params.desc: Wait for duration end to start next movement

params.name: Duration
params.desc: How long in frames to do movement

params.name: Speed
params.desc: How long in frames to do movement

params.name: Angular
params.desc: Angular radius to apply to movement

params.name: Centric
params.desc: Centric radius to apply to movement

params.name: No Centric User Snap
params.desc: Prevents snap back to user for centric movement

params.name: Rate
params.desc: The time in frames for move update.

params.name: Projectile Stats
params.desc: The base stats applied to for the enemy projectile stats

params.name: Enemy
params.desc: The enemy to be used for projectile stats.

params.name: Encounter Troop
params.desc: On projectile hit, force troop encounter.

params.name: Projectile Stats
params.desc: The base stats applied to for the enemy projectile stats

params.name: Drop Items
params.desc: Items drop additionally to database set

params.desc: The common event to play for enemy death

params.name: Death Animation
params.desc: The animation to play for enemy death

params.name: Deflect Action
params.desc: Action enemy takes when in deflect condition

params.name: Deflect Balloon
params.desc: Balloon to play when deflect action is triggered

params.name: Deflect Move Speed
params.desc: Move speed of the enemy on map

params.name: Deflect Priority
params.desc: The priority layer for the enemy

params.desc: Rate at which deflect action is randomly selected
